records.commitment_amount_raw:
Transaction unit amount (e.g.XX square meters, equivalent to XX ping),
unit price, and total transaction price:
(1)Land Area: 8,413.14 square meters , equivalent to 2,544.5 ping, the land
is donated free of charge for public facilities purposes, with the actual
area subject to determined based on the registration by the land
administration authority upon completion of the land readjustment.
(2)Total transaction price: NTD 687,000,000.
(3)Unit price: NTD 269,994 for every 1 Ping.
